# NichePulse — AI-Powered Niche Scoring for Creators

**Stop guessing which niches to pursue. Start scoring them.**

NichePulse uses a data-driven 5-dimension framework to evaluate any niche for print-on-demand, digital products, or e-commerce — in seconds.

## What You Get

### 3 Claude Code Skills

1. **Niche Research** — Score any niche on passion, buy frequency, gift potential, competition, and trend. Includes 14 pre-validated niches with real 2026 market data and step-by-step validation workflow.

2. **SEO Audit** — Complete on-page, technical, and content SEO analysis of any URL. With competitor comparison, keyword opportunities, and prioritized recommendations.

3. **Content Pipeline** — Turn one topic into a complete multi-platform content package (blog, X thread, LinkedIn, Instagram, email). With repurposing schedule.

### NichePulse CLI (also included)

```bash
pip install nichepulse
nichepulse list --top 10
nichepulse score mushroom-foraging
nichepulse compare "mushroom-foraging birding"
nichepulse roadmap urban-beekeeping
```

### Pre-Validated Top Niches (2026 data)

| Niche | Score | Grade | Competition |
|-------|-------|-------|-------------|
| Mushroom Foraging | 22/25 | S | Very Low |
| Birding | 20/25 | A | Low |
| Native Plants | 20/25 | A | Low |
| Women's Outdoor | 20/25 | A | Low |
| Trail Running | 18/25 | A | Medium |
| Hammock Camping | 18/25 | A | Very Low |

## Installation

Skills work with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, or any agent supporting the Agent Skills spec (.claude/skills/ directory).

```bash
# Clone into your project skills directory
git clone https://github.com/nichepulse/skills.git .claude/skills/nichepulse
```

CLI: `pip install nichepulse`

## 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee

If NichePulse doesn't help you find at least one viable niche, email me for a full refund. No questions asked.
